title: narcissus poeticus var. hellenicus
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. hellenicus, also known as the poetic daffodil or hellenic narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Narcissus and the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can be found in its bulbs. The hellenic narcissus has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and possessing potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Narcissus poeticus var. hellenicus include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the dried bulbs or flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
